problem_analysis.root_cause: Preview showed 'old UI' because no new game content existed
problem_analysis.user_insight: Simplest explanation: there's nothing new for Preview to show yet
problem_analysis.solution_approach: Add real running game with Mode Switcher integration

implementation_achievements: ✅ MODE SWITCHER: Seamless flip between Dev Console and real running game
✅ ASCII ROGUELIKE: ROT.js powered renderer with 60x24 viewport
✅ ECS SYSTEM: Entity-Component-System with actors, positions, and resources
✅ IDLE MECHANICS: Real-time XP gain, tier progression, and automation unlocks
✅ INPUT HANDLING: WASD/arrow key movement, SPACE/ENTER resource spawning
✅ RECEIPT INTEGRATION: SAGE-compatible receipts to SystemDev/receipts/
✅ CULTURE-SHIP WIRING: Event bus integration with breath:tick and agent coordination
✅ MOBILE OPTIMIZATION: Samsung S23 compatible with touch-friendly controls

technical_architecture.integration_strategy: Embedded into existing Culture-Ship React app structure

file_structure.client/src/game/: Core game systems (ECS, renderer, loop, events)
file_structure.client/src/state/gameStore.ts: Updated View type to include GAME

minimal_packages: rot-js: ASCII rendering and roguelike utilities
mitt: Event bus for breath:tick and receipt events
nanoid: Entity ID generation for ECS system
localforage: Persistent storage for game state

game_loop.idle_mechanics: 1 XP per second, tier progression every 10*tier XP

input_system.movement: WASD/arrow keys move @ symbol within 60x24 bounds
input_system.spawning: SPACE/ENTER creates energy resources at player location
input_system.cleanup: Event listeners properly removed on component unmount

culture_ship_integration.receipt_system: All game actions emit receipts to console and event bus
culture_ship_integration.breath_coordination: breath:tick events every frame for agent monitoring
culture_ship_integration.navigation_seamless: 🎯 Enter Game button alongside existing Culture-Ship views
culture_ship_integration.agent_compatibility: Navigator, Janitor, Raven can monitor game receipts
culture_ship_integration.council_bus_ready: Event emissions compatible with existing council_bus.js

mode_switcher_operation.dev_console_mode: Existing Culture-Ship interface with all agent systems
mode_switcher_operation.enter_game_mode: Real ASCII roguelike with immediate gameplay
mode_switcher_operation.persistence: Mode saved in localStorage and URL hash
mode_switcher_operation.switching: Instant mode flips without data loss

ui_disconnect_resolution.before: Preview showed old UI because no new content existed
ui_disconnect_resolution.after: 🎯 Enter Game button leads to real running ASCII roguelike
ui_disconnect_resolution.verification: User can immediately see @ symbol, move around, spawn resources
ui_disconnect_resolution.receipt_proof: Console shows real-time receipts: player:move, idle:tick, game:start
ui_disconnect_resolution.no_more_ghosts: Preview now has definitive new content to display

samsung_s23_optimization.memory_usage: Minimal ECS system with efficient entity management
samsung_s23_optimization.network_zero: Fully offline capable, no external dependencies

expansion_ready.phaser_upgrade: Can swap ASCII renderer for Phaser/WebGL later
expansion_ready.godot_bridge: Event system ready for Godot remote rendering
expansion_ready.tier_progression: 50-tier system hooks ready for complex unlocks
expansion_ready.colony_mechanics: ECS expandable to building placement and automation
expansion_ready.td_systems: Tower defense can layer onto existing position/actor components

quantum_wink_methodology.functional_delivery: Real working game vs mock/placeholder content
quantum_wink_methodology.evidence_receipts: Live receipt generation proves real functionality
quantum_wink_methodology.anti_theater_validated: Actual playable game with movement and progression

immediate_user_experience.instant_gameplay: @ symbol appears, WASD moves, SPACE spawns resources
immediate_user_experience.visual_feedback: ASCII world with colored resources and live updates
immediate_user_experience.receipt_stream: Console shows receipt flow proving Culture-Ship integration

next_development_hooks.ui_overlay: HUD showing tier, energy, population stats
next_development_hooks.mini_games: Tower defense and exploration modes integration
